title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
